content: FASE 1: Crear services/football_competitions.py con allowlist + helpers (tiers, aliases, priority, matching)
FASE 2: Crear services/research_queries.py con build_match_research_queries() + intent/budget per tier
FASE 3: Crear services/injury_sources.py - hooks opcionales para rotowire/sportsgambler/promiedos (behind feature flag)
FASE 4: Integrar filtros tier en data_ingestion.py (filter early, sort by priority, env vars FOOTBALL_*)
FASE 5: Logging + metrics (total scraped/allowed/removed/by tier/sent to LLM)
FASE 6: Unit tests del competition matcher (case-insensitive, accent-insensitive, formats varios)
FASE 7: Lint + curl test + testing agent E2E
